title: Nycto: Stone Mask
description: A Nycto Addon which adds a new way to become a vampire!
body:
# Nycto: Stone Mask

A simple mod that adds one item to the jungle temple loot pool: the Stone Mask, famous from JoJo: Phantom Blood and the source of vampirism! Since Nycto has a sophisticated vampirism system, this fits the theme quite well. Does not do a lot on its own other than adding a new way to become a vampire.
